/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Asteroids.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Asteroids.dir/src/GameScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Asteroids.dir/src/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Asteroids.dir/src/MenuScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Asteroids.dir/src/asteroid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Asteroids.dir/src/bullet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Asteroids.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Asteroids.dir/src/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Asteroids.dir/src/ship.cpp.o -o Asteroids  /usr/lib64/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib64/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.68 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_ttf
